questions.text:
What was your hometown like in the past?

  1. Use: My hometown +(to be)

Where did you grow up?

  1. Use: I + (to grow up)

Is it a good place to live?

  1. Use: It + (to be)

What was your hometown like in the past?

  1. Use: It + (to be)

What do people usually do for fun?

  1. Use: They +(to go)
